# Muhammad Umer Khan

> Full Stack Developer based in Karachi, Pakistan, specializing in WordPress development, the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js), and n8n workflow automation. 6+ years of experience, 80+ completed projects, 100% Job Success Score on Upwork.

Muhammad Umer Khan builds custom websites, e-commerce stores, full-stack web applications, and workflow automations for small and mid-sized businesses. He works directly with clients as a freelancer (not through an agency), offering fixed-price packages and free estimation tools.

## Services

- [WordPress Development](https://mumerkhan.com/services/wordpress-development): Custom WordPress themes and sites, no bloated page builders.
- [MERN Stack Development](https://mumerkhan.com/services/mern-stack-development): Full-stack web applications using MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js.
- [n8n Workflow Automation](https://mumerkhan.com/services/n8n-automation): Automating manual business processes (lead routing, data entry, reporting, invoicing) using n8n.
- [E-Commerce Development](https://mumerkhan.com/services/ecommerce-development): WooCommerce and Shopify-style online stores.
- [Figma to Web](https://mumerkhan.com/services/figma-to-web): Converting Figma designs into pixel-accurate, responsive code.
- [UI/UX Design](https://mumerkhan.com/services/ui-ux-design): Interface and experience design in Figma.
- [SEO & Performance](https://mumerkhan.com/services/seo-performance): Core Web Vitals optimization and on-page SEO.
- [Website Maintenance](https://mumerkhan.com/services/website-maintenance): Ongoing support, updates, and security monitoring.

## Free tools

- [Website Cost Calculator](https://mumerkhan.com/tools/website-cost-calculator): Instant price-range estimate for a website project based on scope and features.
- [Automation ROI Calculator](https://mumerkhan.com/tools/automation-roi-calculator): Estimates time and cost savings from automating a manual business process with n8n.

## Key pages

- [About](https://mumerkhan.com/about): Background, experience, and approach to client work.
- [Work](https://mumerkhan.com/work): Portfolio of completed projects.
- [Pricing](https://mumerkhan.com/pricing): Fixed-fee packages by project type.
- [Blog](https://mumerkhan.com/blog): Articles on website costs, timelines, freelancer vs agency decisions, and automation tooling (n8n vs Zapier vs Make).
- [Contact](https://mumerkhan.com/contact): Project inquiry form.
